scenario: Messaging list with group thread, 1:1 thread exposing a /in/ link, archived thread with no preview, and a connection-request invitation. 4 threads total.
notes: Thread 2 is the positive case for the participantProfileUrl heuristic (anchor to /in/ inside the name header). Thread 3 has no preview — parser should emit null, not empty string. Thread 4 (invitation) carries a body snippet.
